# Post Meta

A simple meta component for displaying author information and publication dates. Commonly used in articles, news posts, and blog entries.

## Interactive Preview

<div className="sb-contained-canvas">
  <Canvas of={MetaStories.PostMeta} />
  <Controls of={MetaStories.PostMeta} />
</div>

## When to use it

Use Post Meta when the content is a standard editorial piece — articles, news items, or blog-style entries — where the reader needs to know who wrote it and when it was published.

Don't use Post Meta when the content is an event, profile, or resource. Those types have dedicated meta components with fields specific to their content shape.

## Properties

### Required Properties

{twigPropsTable(componentProps, 'required')}

## Technical Specifications

- **Atomic Level**: Molecule
- **Template**: `yds-basic-meta.twig`
- **Styles**: `_yds-basic-meta.scss`

### Accessibility

- Semantic HTML structure
- Screen reader friendly date formatting via the Date Time atom

## Related Components

- **Date Time**: Atom used within Post Meta for date display
- **Event Meta**: Use for events instead of Post Meta
- **Profile Meta**: Use for person profiles instead of Post Meta
